records.question: Which drivers are assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where school_bus.if_full_time = 1 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find drivers who are assigned to school buses with full-time status. We'll join the driver table with school_bus table and filter where If_full_time indicates full-time employment.

records.question: Which drivers named Douglas McCrory, who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, belong to the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with exactly 8 years of experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.name) like '%douglas mccrory%' and driver.age >= 36 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and driver.party = 'Dem' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 and school_bus.years_working = 8 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find drivers named Douglas McCrory who meet multiple criteria: age >= 36, live in Hartford, belong to Dem party, and drive full-time buses with exactly 8 years of experience. This requires joining the driver table with school_bus table and filtering on all specified conditions.

records.question: Which drivers who live in East Hartford, are Democrats, and drive full-time school buses work with schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.home_city) like '%east hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%democrat%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find drivers from East Hartford who are Democrats and work full-time school buses. We'll join the driver table with school_bus table to find drivers who work with schools, filtering by home city, party, and full-time status.

records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where driver.party = 'Dem' limit 5
records.thought: We need to find drivers who work school buses and have 'Dem' as their party. We'll join the driver table with school_bus table using the Driver_ID foreign key, then filter where Party = 'Dem'.

records.question: Which drivers named Minnie Gonzalez, aged at least 46 and living in Hartford, work full-time driving school buses for no more than 3 years at private schools with grades 5th-12th grade?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.name = 'Minnie Gonzalez' AND driver.age >= 46 AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND school_bus.years_working <= 3 AND school.grade = '5th-12th grade' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school.type = 'Private'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id join school on school_bus.school_id = school.school_id where lower(driver.name) like '%minnie gonzalez%' and driver.age >= 46 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 and school_bus.years_working <= 3 and lower(school.type) like '%private%' and (lower(school.grade) like '%5%' or lower(school.grade) like '%6%' or lower(school.grade) like '%7%' or lower(school.grade) like '%8%' or lower(school.grade) like '%9%' or lower(school.grade) like '%10%' or lower(school.grade) like '%11%' or lower(school.grade) like '%12%') limit 5
records.thought: We need to find drivers named Minnie Gonzalez, aged at least 46, living in Hartford, who work full-time at private schools with grades 5th-12th for no more than 3 years. This requires joining driver, school_bus, and school tables with multiple filter conditions.

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where driver.age >= 46 and school_bus.years_working = 3 and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find drivers aged at least 46 who have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers. This requires joining the driver table with school_bus table, filtering by age >= 46, years_working = 3, and if_full_time = true.
